zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Lacy於1223年1月25日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，她的父親John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland14歲，母親Isabel le Bigod12歲。她於1244年3月15日與Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年4月19日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆特利姆享年81歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Lacy于1223年1月25日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林时，她的父亲John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland14岁，母亲Isabel le Bigod12岁。她于1244年3月15日与Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年4月19日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆特利姆享年81岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Lacy was born on 25 January 1223, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, her father, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, was 14 and her mother, Isabel le Bigod, was 12. She married Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville on 15 March 1244. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 April 1304, in Trim, Trim, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 81, and was buried in Trim, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Lacy est née le 25 janvier 1223, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Bigod, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville le 15 mars 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1304, à Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Trim, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Lacy am 25. Januar 1223 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland 14 und ihre Mutter Isabel le Bigod 12. Sie hat am 15. März 1244 Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. April 1304 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Trim, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lacy è nata il il 25 gennaio 1223 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Isabel le Bigod, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville il 15 marzo 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 aprile 1304, nel Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Lacyが1223年1月25日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Irelandは14歳，母Isabel le Bigodは12歳であった。1244年3月15日にGeoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Genevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年4月19日にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムトリムで81歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアストリムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Lacy(이)가 1223년 1월 25일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel le Bigod(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1244년 3월 15일 Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 4월 19일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림 트림에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에 묻혔다.

pt.25 January 1223–19 April 1304: 25 de janeiro de 1223–19 de abril de 1304
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lacy nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1223, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Bigod, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville em 15 de março de 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1304, em Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Lacy родилась 25 января 1223 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Bigod, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville 15 марта 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 апреля 1304 г. в местности трим, трим, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Lacy nació el 25 de enero de 1223, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Isabel le Bigod, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville el 15 de marzo de 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de abril de 1304, en Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.
